name: White and Wild Rice Stuffing- Country Living
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy 4-quart saucepan or Dutch oven, heat the butter. Add wild rice and celery. Saute until lightly browned. Add water, chicken broth, bay leaf, salt, oregano, and pepper to the pan. Bring to a boil; cover and cook over low heat for 25 minutes.
2. Stir in the white rice; cook, covered, until the rice is tender, about 20 minutes longer. Fold in the chopped apple and green onions.
3. Set the stuffing aside just until cool enough to stuff the neck and body cavities of a turkey. Alternatively, spoon the stuffing into a greased 2-1/2-quart casserole; cover and bake at 325°F for about 20 minutes or until the apples are tender.
